otherNightReminder: The Paladin might use their ability.
name: Paladin
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose an alive player (not yourself): If they wake tonight, they may use their ability an additional time. This cannot cause a second death at night.
flavor: AKA: Mike Wheeler. "I think we would work better as a team. Friends. Best friends."

otherNightReminder: The Sorcerer might choose a player: Show the Sorcer their character token. Pick a player on the opposing team and show them the *THIS PLAYER IS* card, then their character token, then the selected player.
name: Sorcerer
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose an alive player: learn their alignment. A player on the evil team learns their character.

firstNightReminder: Show the Advocate the Idol's character, and the number of steps away they are.
name: Advocate
ability: You start knowing a good character and how many steps away they are.

name: Ranger
ability: You start knowing if there are more evil players are on odd or even seat numbers. If equal, learn arbitrary info.

otherNightReminder: The Mage chooses a player and a character. Give them feedback on their guess: *CLOCKWISE* or *COUNTER-CLOCKWISE*.
name: Mage
ability: Each night*, choose a player and a character: you learn if they are closer clockwise or counter-clockwise. If the chosen character is not in play or equally far, learn arbitrary info.

otherNightReminder: Wake the Cursed. :reminder:
name: Cursed
ability: Each night, wake. If you woke tonight, the evil team cannot win until the end of the next night.

otherNightReminder: The Hair might pick a player to swap seats with.
name: Hair
ability: Each night*, you may choose a player: you swap seats with them at dawn, and you do not wake the following night.
flavor: AKA, Steve The Hair Harrington and his 1983 BMW 733i

otherNightReminder: If the Mark is evil, they die. No other deaths can occur tonight.
name: Marksman
ability: Once per game, during the day, before executions, publically choose a player. Tonight, if evil was chosen, they die and any other deaths are undone.

otherNightReminder: On Even nights, show the Photographer the chosen player's character. On Odd nights, the Photographer chooses a player. :reminder: Remove any tokens from the previous night. :reminder:
name: Photographer
ability: On even nights, choose a player: a chosen evil player learns that you are the Photographer. On odd nights, learn the character of players chosen the previous night.

otherNightReminder: The Rocker chooses a player who cannot be prevented from waking tonight. :reminder:
name: Rocker
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they are safe from abilities that would prevent them from waking tonight.

otherNightReminder: If the Thorn dies, show them the Demon's character token, and either *ODDS* or *EVENS*.
name: Thorn
ability: If the demon kills you at night, you learn their character, and if they are sitting on either an odd or even seat number.

name: Hellfire
ability: During the day, before nominations, you may publicly claim to be the Hellfire. If you do so, your alive good neighbors are safe from evil until dawn.

otherNightReminder: Show the Intuition a number.
name: Intuition
ability: Each night*, learn how many players were prevented from waking due to any player's ability.

otherNightReminder: The Compromise chooses if they are drunk until dawn.
name: Compromise
ability: When a player on your team would die at night, you die instead. Each night*, choose if you are drunk until dusk.

firstNightReminder: Show the Righteous the Scapegoat's character token. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: Ask the Righteous if they want to use their ability.
name: Righteous
ability: You start knowing an in play Townsfolk character. Once per game, at night, you may choose to learn a player: if you have nominated, executed, and killed the known character, learn an evil player. Otherwise, learn an arbitrary player. [+1 Outsider]

firstNightReminder: Wake the Demon. Show them the *THIS PLAYER IS* card, then the Convict token, then point at the Convict player.
name: Convict
ability: You might register as evil and as a Demon. The Demon knows you are the Convict.

firstNightReminder: Two players might swap seats at dawn.
otherNightReminder: Two players might swap seats at dawn.
name: Smuggler
ability: Once per game, the storyteller will swap two players seats at dawn, even if you are dead.

otherNightReminder: One of the Stoner's alive neighbors might not wake.
name: Stoner
ability: When you learn that you died, publicly chose one alive player. If it was a good player, they are prevented from waking from now on.

otherNightReminder: The Pursuit may mark two players to swap seats at dawn.
name: Pursuit
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose two players: they swap seats at dawn.

firstNightReminder: Wake the Flayed to give them their Townsfolk ability. Mark the Reminders with this ability, and let them use it now if they went before this in the night order.
otherNightReminder: The Flayed chooses an alive nieghbor. They do not wake tonight.
name: Flayed
ability: Each night*, you may choose an alive neighbor: they do not wake tonight. You have a not in play Townsfolk ability; you know which. [+1 Outsider]

firstNightReminder: Do not give the Pack any starting info. Do not include the Pack in the Minion or Demon starting info.
name: Pack
ability: Each night*, choose a player: learn if they are evil. You are not included in, nor do you recieve, Minion or Demon starting information. [+1 Pack, -0 to -1 Outsider]

name: Shadow
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they do not wake tonight. Each night*, choose if players who are prevented from waking instead wake and are poisoned until dusk.

otherNightReminder: The Puppetmaster chooses a player. If the Puppetmaster has not used their ability and a player died to execution, let them use it.
name: Puppetmaster
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Once per game, at night, if a player was executed and died that day, choose an alive neighbor and a character they become. They join your team. If a Demon is made, deaths tonight are arbitrary. [-1 Minion]

otherNightReminder: The Ritualist chooses a player to die.
name: Ritualist
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. You start knowing Odds or Evens. If, after dawn, all good players on corresponding seats are dead, your team wins. [-1 Outsider]

firstNightReminder: Tell the Monomaniac an in play Townsfolk character.
otherNightReminder: A player dies. If the player with the Monomania reminder was executed today, the game ends and the Monomaniac's team wins.
name: Monomaniac
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. You start knowing an in play Townsfolk character. If you nominate and kill them via execution, your team wins.

otherNightReminder: The Nightmare chooses a player not to wake, and a player to die.
name: Nightmare
ability: Each night*, choose two players (not yourself): the first does not wake, the second dies. You are safe from abilities that would prevent you from waking at night. [+0 to +1 Outsider]
